_comment: sovereign-os selfdef module-catalog dashboard. Visualizes the selfdef-side selfdef_modules_* gauges shipped via the selfdef-modules-textfile.{service,timer} pair (selfdef commits 1ce88c7 + b2f2e20) into node_exporter's textfile_collector. Pairs with the 3 alert rules (SelfdefModulesTextfileEmitFailed/ObserverSilent/CountLow) in config/prometheus/alerts/selfdef-modules-catalog.rules.yml and the runbook sections in docs/operator/m060-deployment-guide.md. The selfdef module catalog is a load-bearing IPS surface (188+ modules at install time covering hardening/observability/etc categories). Operator imports into Grafana via Settings → JSON Model. Project boundary R10212: pure observability — no mutation surface.

panels.title: total modules in catalog
panels.description: Rollup count of all selfdef modules currently catalogued under /usr/share/selfdef/modules/. selfdef ships 188+ modules at install time; a count below 100 triggers the SelfdefModulesCountLow alert.

panels.title: observer age (s)
panels.description: Seconds since the selfdef-modules-textfile.timer last fired. Red at 300s (matches the SelfdefModulesObserverSilent alert threshold + the M060 chain + four-watchdog observer-silent thresholds — locked across all 3 observability verticals via cross-surface contract).

panels.title: categories tracked
panels.description: Distinct module categories the observer has emitted in this scrape window. Healthy installs surface multiple categories (hardening / observability / etc); a sudden drop to 0 means the observer is wedged.

panels.title: observer emit-failed
panels.description: Honest-offline sentinel. 1 = the wrapper failed to emit fresh gauges (selfdefctl absent / jq absent / daemon unreachable / malformed JSON). When this is 1, do NOT trust the other gauges — they are STALE. Drives the SelfdefModulesTextfileEmitFailed alert and takes precedence over rollup alerts.

panels.title: modules by category over time
panels.description: One series per module category (hardening / observability / etc). Operators see drift in real-time — a hardening category dropping silently weakens the IPS spine and is page-worthy. Legend formats with the category label for direct identification.

panels.title: total modules over time (with low-floor threshold)
panels.description: Rollup count of total modules over time. Red threshold step at value=100 matches the SelfdefModulesCountLow alert floor. A drop below this line indicates an installation problem (incomplete deb / corrupted modules dir).

panels.title: current per-category breakdown
panels.description: Live triage table. One row per module category with the current count. Sort by count descending to surface the largest categories first. Drift on the hardening / observability rows is operator-actionable.

panels.title: current per-phase breakdown
panels.description: Live triage table by install phase (pre / main / post). The 3 install phases govern boot-order dependencies — a `pre` phase module dropping silently breaks downstream `main` and `post` phase modules.

panels.title: observer-freshness — emit-failed sentinel over time
panels.description: The honest-offline sentinel gauge. Red bands mark wedged-wrapper windows when the operator MUST NOT trust the other gauges. Pairs with the SelfdefModulesTextfileEmitFailed alert (5m for-window).

title: sovereign-os — selfdef module-catalog
